name: Space Invaders
description: Space Invaders is a fixed shooter where the player controls a laser cannon that moves horizontally along the bottom of the screen. The objective is to defend against waves of descending aliens. These aliens move horizontally across the screen, gradually descending each time they reach an edge. They also fire projectiles downwards towards the player's cannon. The game ends when either the aliens reach the bottom of the screen, or the player's cannon is destroyed by alien fire. The player scores points for each alien destroyed. The game features destructible barriers that provide temporary cover for the player's cannon but are eroded by both alien and player fire. New waves of aliens appear when the previous wave is defeated, starting the next level.

controls.arrow_left: Move the player's cannon to the left.
controls.arrow_right: Move the player's cannon to the right.
controls.space: Fire a projectile from the player's cannon.
